---
title: "Priming analysis: SBE"
author: "Sean Trott"
date: "2-23-2026"
output:
  html_document:
    keep_md: yes
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(dpi = 300, fig.format = "png")
```


# Setup

Load libraries

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(broom.mixed)
library(lmerTest)
library(ggridges)
```


# Load data

```{r}
# setwd("/Users/seantrott/Dropbox/UCSD/Research/Ambiguity/SSD/llm_sbe/src/analysis")

df_pythia = read_csv("../../data/processed/leinenger/leinenger_pythia-2.8b_surprisals.csv")

```


# Analysis

```{r}
df_pythia %>%
  group_by(condition, repeated) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_surprisal = mean(target_token_surprisal, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_surprisal = sd(target_token_surprisal, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = condition,
             y = mean_surprisal,
             color = repeated)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(ymin = mean_surprisal - se_surprisal,
                      ymax = mean_surprisal + se_surprisal),
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.2),
                  size = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("yes" = "#4E79A7", "no" = "#E15759")) +
  labs(x = "Bias",
       y = "Target token surprisal",
       color = "Repeated") +
  theme_minimal()


df_pythia %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = target_token_surprisal,
             fill = repeated,
             y = condition)) +
  geom_density_ridges(color = NA, alpha = 0.7, scale = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("yes" = "#4E79A7", "no" = "#E15759")) +
  labs(x = "Target token surprisal",
       y = NULL,
       fill = "Repeated") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

df_pythia %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = target_span_surprisal_sum,
             fill = repeated,
             y = condition)) +
  geom_density_ridges(color = NA, alpha = 0.7, scale = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("yes" = "#4E79A7", "no" = "#E15759")) +
  labs(x = "Target span sum surprisal",
       y = NULL,
       fill = "Repeated") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

df_pythia %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = spillover_1_surprisal,
             fill = repeated,
             y = condition)) +
  geom_density_ridges(color = NA, alpha = 0.7, scale = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("yes" = "#4E79A7", "no" = "#E15759")) +
  labs(x = "Spillover surprisal",
       y = NULL,
       fill = "Repeated") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

df_pythia %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = spillover_2_surprisal,
             fill = repeated,
             y = condition)) +
  geom_density_ridges(color = NA, alpha = 0.7, scale = 0.9) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("yes" = "#4E79A7", "no" = "#E15759")) +
  labs(x = "Spillover surprisal",
       y = NULL,
       fill = "Repeated") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top"
  )



mod = lmer(data = df_pythia,
           target_token_surprisal ~ repeated * condition + (1|homophone))
summary(mod)





```
